title: Group Description Information
excerpt: There should be the option to add a short amount of information about a group the way there is about a column. Especially as so many boards involve the “Move item to group when status is changed” automation.

posts.author: kthorne (Kirt Thorne)
posts.cookedHtml: There should be the option to add a short amount of information about a group the way there is about a column. Especially as so many boards involve the “Move item to group when status is changed” automation.

posts.author: arossow (Aaron Rossow)
posts.cookedHtml: Ca we get a Subtitle to the Group name? It would be useful to list how things move from group to group.

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml: I was looking through the forum posts for anything requesting a group description and this was the closest I found. It would be really helpful to have the ability to create a group description similar to how boards or columns can have descriptions.

posts.author: Ant214 (Anthony Ali)
posts.cookedHtml: There is a way to add a description to the specific board at the top by clicking the circled “i” but it would be nice to be able to add a description to each group as well outlining what’s expected.

posts.author: SamHadfield (Sam H)
posts.cookedHtml: Would also love to see this feature! We have group sections applicable to certain people so it would be useful to add a quick note about that.
